## Validation evidence

## Readiness approval

- [ ] The branch owner has reviewed this work and approves moving the linked issue to Ready
- [ ] This pull request targets `master`
- [ ] No unrelated work is included

> Merging and moving the linked issue to Done are manager responsibilities. Done means merged into `master`; completed issues are not reopened for follow-up changes.
